intro: I am interested in the Senior Data Engineer contract role in Dallas. My background combines senior-level data engineering, Python and SQL pipeline development, AWS data platforms, PySpark, data modeling, and enterprise-scale operational data systems.
body: At Citi, I built and operated automated Python ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with repeatable workflows used for analytics, forecasting, and executive reporting. I also helped build a hybrid AWS and Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Redshift, optimized schemas, and PySpark/Python processing patterns for large-scale capacity and risk analysis.

Your role emphasizes scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, data lakes, warehouses, SQL optimization, governance, quality, and collaboration with analytics and product teams. Those are the areas where my experience is strongest: designing pipeline outputs that teams can trust, improving performance and data reliability, building reporting-ready models, and translating business and operational requirements into usable data products.

I also bring senior engineering judgment from years of work across regulated banking, high-volume transaction systems, observability platforms, and data migration programs. I have hands-on experience with AWS, Spark/PySpark, Hadoop/Hive concepts, Docker, Git, Airflow, data quality, and ML data pipelines, while continuing to grow my Databricks, Delta Lake, Snowflake, Kafka, and Terraform skills honestly as adjacent modern platform capabilities.
conclusion: I would welcome the opportunity to bring practical senior data engineering experience, strong troubleshooting habits, and production pipeline discipline to this role.
